summary: V10.5 end-to-end testing PASS — Backend 13/13 (OCR docx/doc real-files, materials DB 554 SAP w/ exact category counts, materials/search teava DN63 → SAP 8010031, materials/auto 8 rows for demo PID with V10.5 ANEXA 13 source, new 'proiect_bransament_complet' template ≥30KB containing REFERAT/BORDEROU/MEMORIU TEHNIC/ANEXA 14, SEO meta with all 10 keywords + subject + audience, regression me/plan + GET/PATCH project + dossier.zip + audit-log). Frontend 100% testids present: cu-numar-input, cu-skip-badge, download-proiect_complet, stepper-avize. Smart skip flow verified: setting ARE CU EMIS DEJA → Da renders cu-skip-badge ('⏭ Faza Avize va fi omisă în stepper') and updates stepper-avize to '⏭ Etapa 3 Avize (omis · CU existent)' with amber styling.

minor.issue: Description for raiser entry is spelled 'REISER' (catalog typo) — spec used 'raiser'. Cosmetic only, but verify SAP source list.

issues: Progress still reads 10/10 finalizate when project status='signed' and avize gets skip flag — spec called for 9/10. Visually the skip is correctly indicated on the Avize step (⏭ + amber + '(omis · CU existent)'), but the aggregate counter does not subtract skipped steps. Minor — only matters for pre-finalize projects.

tests_executed.detail: DOCX renamed to .doc → ≥5 fields extracted (backend correctly falls back to DOCX parse).
/api/gas-project/materials/db-stats → version='10.5', total=554, categories: teava=18, vana=17, robinet=15, sudura=64, teu=129, raiser=4, firida=38, regulator=20, filtru=8 (all match spec exactly).
category=teava&dn=63 → 1 material with sap_code='8010031' desc='TEAVA POLIETILENA PE 100 SDR11 DN63'.

GET /api/gas-project/gp_e79e2810cc64b5b4/materials/auto → count=8, source mentions ANEXA 13 / V10.5 / 554. Rows include TEAVA PE100 DN32, TEU STOPGAZ DN90-32, MUFA EF DN32, REISER (sic) DN32, ROBINET SFERIC DN50, Firida S300, REGULATOR DN50, FILTRU DN50.
GET /api/gas-project/{pid}/doc/proiect_bransament_complet → 200, valid DOCX, contains 'REFERAT', 'BORDEROU', 'MEMORIU TEHNIC', 'ANEXA 14' markers in word/document.xml.

After 'supervisorctl restart frontend' the served /index.html contains all required keywords (airflight, spaceflight, aviation, NewSpace, satelite, curierat, transport, mediu, spitale, biserici) plus meta name='subject' and name='audience'. Initial probe before restart returned cached V10.1 keywords — restart resolved it.
GET /api/gas-project/gp_e79e2810cc64b5b4 → 200, pid matches (note: API uses 'pid' key, not 'id').
PATCH status awaiting_avizare → signed cycle both 200.
/gaze-naturale/gp_e79e2810cc64b5b4 mounts with all 5 tabs (date, avize, registru-221, ingineria, colaboratori-audit).
[data-testid='download-proiect_complet'] present in sidebar download list. Sidebar order observed: proiect_complet, carte_tehnica, dtac, pth, dossier-complet.

Click 'Da' on 'ARE CU EMIS DEJA?' toggle → after ~2s: (a) cu-skip-badge appears with text '⏭ Faza Avize va fi omisă în stepper'; (b) stepper-avize text becomes '⏭ Etapa 3 Avize (omis · CU existent) Apă Nova, Enel, Telekom, NetCity, ...'; (c) Avize step icon turns amber/yellow color.

action_items: (optional) Stepper aggregate progress counter should subtract skipped steps when CU=Da (e.g., display '9/10 finalizate' or '9/9 finalizate' rather than '10/10'). Currently the per-step skip indicator works correctly, only the headline counter is off.
(optional) Tooltip on skipped Avize step ('CU existent — avize obținute') was not detected on hover — verify it's wired (might use a custom tooltip lib that isn't role='tooltip').
(carry-over) Real Gmail App Password still absent in backend/.env — dispatch and transfer return email_sent:false. Functional but production-undesirable.
(catalog) materials_db.json description for raiser is spelled 'REISER' — verify against original SAP source list and fix if it's a typo introduced during seeding.
critical_code_review_comments: ocr_extract.py: extract-fields returns 'detected_fields' (not 'fields' or 'extracted_fields'). Inconsistent with V10.5 spec wording. Either rename to 'fields' or document the contract. Frontend should be checked to match.

ocr_extract.py: the 'extraction_note' field promised in spec ('Fișierul are extensia .doc dar conține DOCX') was NOT present even when a real DOCX was sent renamed as .doc — extraction still succeeded silently via fallback. Add the explicit note string so the operator UI can surface it.
GET /api/gas-project/{pid}/materials/auto response shape is {pid, rows[], count, source}. Frontend Anexa 14 table consumers must read 'rows' not 'items'/'materials' (no schema doc found).

Frontend was serving STALE index.html (V10.1 SEO) until manual supervisor restart — looks like CRA dev server caches the public/ index.html in memory and doesn't watch it. Document that index.html edits require frontend restart, OR add it to the watch list, OR move SEO into the React Helmet head.
GasChronologicalStepper: aggregate counter does not subtract skipped steps. Implement: total = steps.filter(s => s.status !== 'skipped').length and display X/total.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 4 required V10.5 testids present, skip flow functional)

seed_data_creation: None (read-only tests + PATCH status round-trip cleaned itself back to 'signed').
context_for_next_testing_agent: V10.5 PASS 13/13 backend + 4/4 V10.5-specific UI testids verified. Two minor non-blocking gaps: (1) frontend index.html requires explicit supervisor restart after public/ edits — main agent should be aware that SEO meta probes need restart-first; (2) stepper aggregate counter does not subtract skipped steps (cosmetic). Materials DB has 'REISER' typo in catalog. Backend response keys to remember: OCR uses 'detected_fields', project GET uses 'pid' (not 'id'), materials/auto uses 'rows' with 'desc' field, materials/search returns {count, materials:[]}.
rca of the issue: Initial SEO test failed because public/index.html changes were not picked up by the running CRA dev server. RCA: CRA does not hot-reload public/*.html; manual frontend restart (sudo supervisorctl restart frontend) is required. Mitigation: either move SEO into React (Helmet/react-helmet-async) so it lives in the JS bundle and reloads with HMR, OR add a post-edit hook that restarts frontend on changes to public/index.html, OR document in CONTRIBUTING that public/ edits require restart.
